steps.title: Recognize the key finding
steps.content:
The notes state “They found that certain fibers allow the brain to toggle from one method of processing smells to another” and then specify both methods: capturing information at a given moment, and tracking changes over time.

An effective summary must present this discovery—the toggle mechanism and both processing approaches.

steps.title: Match the finding to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice directly reports both methods of smell processing and the toggle between them—exactly what the study found.

The other choices fail to summarize the findings:
  • A foregrounds the methodology instead
  • B describes only one method
  • C describes the research goal rather than what was discovered
D is correct.
